The acquisition deal is valued at over ₹9,000 crore.

news.title:
Bosch Ltd acquires 100% of Bosch Chassis Systems India for Rs. 9068.7 cr.
Payment includes cash and 2460 shares at Rs. 35,200 each; adds safety tech to portfolio.
news.summary:
Bosch Ltd acquires 100% of Bosch Chassis Systems India for Rs. 9068.7 cr.
Payment includes cash and 2460 shares at Rs. 35,200 each; adds safety tech to portfolio.

news.title:
Bosch's board approves buying Bosch Chassis Systems India for ₹9,068.7 crore.
Deal includes issuing 1,230 new shares for promoters to make it a fully owned unit.
news.summary:
